case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. VS. JOSE VALENTIN GUEVARA RODRIGUEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-17-2015 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,352.96 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GUEVARA RODRIGUEZ, JOSE VALENTIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC.
